nasb.text: and Cyrus, king of Persia, had them brought out by the hand of Mithredath the treasurer, and he counted them out to Sheshbazzar, the prince of Judah.

esv.text: Cyrus king of Persia brought these out in the charge of Mithredath the treasurer, who counted them out to Sheshbazzar the prince of Judah.

cnv.text: 波斯王古列命令司庫官米提利達把這些器皿拿出來，按數交給猶大的領袖設巴薩。

ccb.text: 派财政大臣米提利达如数交给犹大的首领设巴萨：
